# AstroNvim Configuration

My personal AstroNvim configuration repository.

#### Clone AstroNvim

```shell
git clone https://github.com/AstroNvim/AstroNvim ~/.config/nvim
```

#### Clone Configuration

```shell
git clone https://github.com/mahyarmirrashed/astronvim_config ~/.config/nvim/lua/user
```

#### Start Neovim

```shell
nvim
```
